description_long: This is a small, rounded plastic bottle with a white body and a colorful label wrapped around its midsection. The label features playful cartoon fruit illustrations and vibrant text, suggesting a citrus-themed product. The bottle has a short neck and a prominent, cylindrical screw-on cap, which is also white. Nutritional information and a barcode are visible on the back, along with recycling and handling symbols. The overall design is cheerful and eye-catching, likely intended to appeal to children or families. The bottle appears lightweight and portable, suitable for carrying in a bag or placing on a bathroom shelf.
description: A small, white plastic bottle with a screw-on cap and a colorful citrus-themed label featuring cartoon fruit and product branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with cartoon fruit, product name, and branding.
description_view_1: Side view displaying more of the label's fruit illustrations and partial nutritional info.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the nutritional information, recycling symbols, and barcode.
description_view_3: Side-back view showing the barcode, recycling symbols, and partial product name.
